##NAMES=Christofschaferite-(Ce)
##RRUFFID=R141090
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=(Ce,La,Ca)_4_Mn(Ti,Fe)_3_(Fe,Ti)(Si_2_O_7_)_2_O_8_
##LOCALITY=Wingertsberg pumice quarry, Laach lake volcano, Mendig, Eifel, Germany
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Ch. and H. Schäfer
##DESCRIPTION=Thick tabular or short prismatic black crystals, 2-fold twin around a*, associated with light brown rhodonite and colorless orthoclase.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R141090
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 13.357 b: 5.733 c: 11.085 alpha: 90 beta: 100.58 gamma: 90 volume: 834.4 crystal system: monoclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
